title: Bump 1.8
body: Bump to 1.8.  I'd thought about 1.7.4, but given the Fedora 30 packaging and the change to c/storage here, I went to 1.8.

comments.body:
LGTM, I agree that 1.8 seems good. One thing I just noted is that we did not consistently follow semver with the versioning as 1.x should be a 1.x.0.

Can we name it 1.8.0 (also the git tag)? This would help a bit with using `go mod` as we had a consistent versioning scheme.
Ugh, completely hosed my branch trying to update the first commit.  Going to kill this and start up a new one.
